title: Getting services in New Zealand :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Getting services in New Zealand
When you come to New Zealand, you will need to set up your mobile phone and internet, and you may also need to arrange utilities for your home, such as water and electricity.
- Getting electricity, water and other utilities for your home How you get services like electricity, water and the internet in New Zealand may be different to what you are used to.

## Getting electricity, water and other utilities for your home
How you get services like electricity, water and the internet in New Zealand may be different to what you are used to.
- Using mobile phones, internet, TV and radio When you arrive in New Zealand, you will need to set up your mobile phone and get access to the internet, TV and radio.

## Using mobile phones, internet, TV and radio
When you arrive in New Zealand, you will need to set up your mobile phone and get access to the internet, TV and radio.
